news.t: Horizon Kinetics Launches an Actively Managed Texas Exchange Traded Fund (TEXX)

holdings.infoBox: TEXX is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Permian Basin Royalty Trust stock at 7.69%, US BANK MMDA - USBGFS 7 at 7.21%, LandBridge Company LLC at 6.16%, Diamondback Energy at 4.48%, and Texas Pacific Land at 4.39%.

overview.description: The Horizon Kinetics Texas ETF (TEXX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of Texas companies. Security selection focuses on businesses poised to benefit from the long-term economic growth, population expansion, and favorable tax and legal environment in Texas. TEXX was launched on Jan 22, 2026 and is issued by Horizon Kinetics.

data.title: Horizon Kinetics Launches an Actively Managed Texas Exchange Traded Fund (TEXX)
data.text: Horizon Kinetics LLC is pleased to announce the Texas ETF (ticker: TEXX), an actively managed fund that began trading on the Nasdaq Stock Exchange today. NEW YORK CITY, NEW YORK / ACCESS Newswire / Ja...
